message:
docs: add API doc comments to io_adapter, contended_mutex, and pool headers

Add concise doc comments to previously undocumented public function
declarations across three headers:

- include/asx/bytes/io_adapter.h: Document init/adapter functions for
  asx_mem_read, asx_mem_write, asx_chain_reader, and asx_take_reader.
  Also add blank-line separation between related init/adapter pairs
  for readability.

- include/asx/sync/contended_mutex.h: Document the async lock lifecycle
  (lock_begin, poll_lock, lock_cancel) and the arena reset function.

- include/asx/sync/pool.h: Document the arena reset function with a
  note that it destroys all resources and is test-only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
